goal: exists(k0: A) { closed_interval(a, b, k0) and f(k0) = y }

p.c: function[T0: LinearOrder, T1](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1) { exists(k0: T0) { closed_interval[T0](x0, x1, k0) and x2(k0) = x3 } = closed_interval_map_image[T0, T1](x2, x0, x1, x3) }[A, B](a, b, f, y)
is_monotone[A, B](f)
closed_interval(a, b, x) and f(x) = y
closed_interval(a, b, x)
f(x) != y
closed_interval(a, b, x) and f(x) = y
f(x) = y

function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { forall(x3: T0) { not x0(x3) or closed_interval[T0](x1, x2, x3) } = is_bounded_by_interval[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[B](closed_interval_map_image[A, B](f, a, b), f(a), f(b))

function[T0: LinearOrder, T1: LinearOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { closed_interval_image_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) = closed_interval[T1](x0(x1), x0(x2), x0(x3)) }[A, B](f, a, b, x)

function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { forall(x3: T0) { not x0(x3) or closed_interval[T0](x1, x2, x3) } = is_bounded_by_interval[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[A](closed_interval_image_preimage[A, B](f, a, b), a, b)

function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { forall(x3: T0) { not x0(x3) or open_interval[T0](x1, x2, x3) } = is_contained_in_open_interval[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[A](open_interval_image_preimage[A, B](f, a, b), a, b)
